dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui

Class ConfigBasedGuiBase<T extends dev.triumphteam.gui.guis.BaseGui,S extends IStorage>

  • java.lang.Object
    • dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui.ConfigBasedGuiBase<T,S>
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    ConfigBasedGui, ConfigBasedPaginatedGui, ConfigGui

    public abstract class ConfigBasedGuiBase<T extends dev.triumphteam.gui.guis.BaseGui,S extends IStorage>
extends Object

    • Method Detail

      • setupStorage

        protected void setupStorage(Consumer<S> initStorage)
        Used to set up the storage. ONLY call this in the constructor.

        Parameters:
        initStorage - The callback to set up the storage
        Since:
        1.16.0

      • load

        public void load(File folder)
        Load the gui from a file. This will clear the item and load the item from the config.

        Parameters:
        folder - The folder to load the gui from
        Since:
        1.5

      • save

        public void save(File folder)
        Save the gui to a file.

        Parameters:
        folder - The folder to save the gui to
        Since:
        1.5

      • createStorage

        protected abstract S createStorage(@Nullable
                                   S parent)
        Create a new storage. Default vars can be set here, setupStorage(Consumer) can also be used in constructor.

        Parameters:
        parent - The parent storage, called when a local storage is created.
        Returns:
        The storage
        Since:
        1.18.0

      • init

        public abstract void init()
        Initialize the default items. Will be overwritten by the config later.
        Since:
        1.5

      • open

        public void open(org.bukkit.entity.Player p)
        What do you think this does?

        Parameters:
        p - Yes, I use p for player
        Since:
        1.5

      • open

        public void open(org.bukkit.entity.Player p,
                 Consumer<S> initStorage)
        What do you think this does?

        Parameters:
        p - Yes, I use p for player
        initStorage - A callback to set up the local storage
        Since:
        1.11.0

      • openByIStorage

        public void openByIStorage(org.bukkit.entity.Player p,
                           Consumer<IStorage> initStorage)
        Opens the gui with a storage initializer with a IStorage.

        Parameters:
        p - Yes, I use p for player
        initStorage - A callback to set up the local storage
        Since:
        1.18.0

      • setItem

        public void setItem(Item<T,S> item)
        Set an item in the gui. If the item has a -1 slot, it will be added to the gui without a slot. Pls, use the item(String, int, ItemBuilder) method to create the item.

        Parameters:
        item - The item to set
        Since:
        1.5

      • item

        protected Item<T,S> item(String id,
                         int slot,
                         ItemBuilder item)
        Create a new item.

        Parameters:
        id - The id of the item
        slot - The slot of the item
        item - The item
        Returns:
        The item
        Since:
        1.5

      • item

        protected Item<T,S> item(String id,
                         String slot,
                         ItemBuilder item)
        Create a new item.

        Parameters:
        id - The id of the item
        slot - The slot of the item
        item - The item
        Returns:
        The item
        Since:
        1.15.0

      • item

        protected Item<T,S> item(String id,
                         ItemBuilder item)
        Create a new item, with no slot.

        Parameters:
        id - The id of the item
        item - The item
        Returns:
        The item
        Since:
        1.5

      • staticItem

        protected StaticItem<T,S> staticItem(int slot,
                                     Function<org.bukkit.entity.Player,ItemBuilder> func)
        Create a new static item. Use -1 as the slot to add the item to the gui without a slot.

        Parameters:
        slot - The slot of the item
        func - The function to get the item
        Returns:
        The item
        Since:
        1.5

      • asyncItem

        protected Item<T,S> asyncItem(String id,
                              int slot,
                              ItemBuilder item)
        Create a new async item. Use -1 as the slot to add the item to the gui without a slot.

        Parameters:
        id - The id of the item
        slot - The slot of the item
        item - The item
        Returns:
        The item
        Since:
        1.18.0

      • asyncItem

        protected Item<T,S> asyncItem(String id,
                              String slot,
                              ItemBuilder item)
        Create a new async item, from a string slot. Use -1 as the slot to add the item to the gui without a slot.

        Parameters:
        id - The id of the item
        slot - The slot of the item
        item - The item
        Returns:
        The item
        Since:
        1.18.0

      • createGui

        protected abstract T createGui(org.bukkit.entity.Player p)
        Create the base gui.

        Parameters:
        p - The player to create the gui for
        Returns:
        The base gui
        Since:
        1.5

      • getTitle

        protected String getTitle(org.bukkit.entity.Player p)
        Get the title of the gui.

        Parameters:
        p - The player to get the title for
        Returns:
        The title
        Since:
        1.10.0

      • onCreate

        public void onCreate(org.bukkit.entity.Player player,
                     T gui,
                     S localStorage)
        Called right before opening the gui.

        Parameters:
        player - The player that is opening the gui.
        gui - The gui that is being opened.
        localStorage - The storage that is being used.
        Since:
        1.17.0

      • onClose

        public void onClose(org.bukkit.entity.Player player,
                    T gui,
                    S localStorage)
        Called when the gui is closed.

        Parameters:
        player - The player that is closing the gui.
        gui - The gui that is being closed.
        localStorage - The storage that is being used.
        Since:
        1.17.0

      • defaultClick

        public void defaultClick(org.bukkit.entity.Player player,
                         T gui,
                         org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryClickEvent event,
                         S localStorage)
        Called when a player clicks in the gui. Remember if there is a click action on the item, then it will also be called.

        Parameters:
        player - The player that clicked.
        gui - The gui that was clicked in.
        event - The event that was triggered.
        localStorage - The storage that is being used.
        Since:
        1.17.0

      • fillGui

        protected void fillGui(dev.triumphteam.gui.guis.BaseGui gui)
